name: Auditory Illusion
description: Sound illusion; volume up to 4 humans shouting per level; sound can move, change, and evolve. rat horde = 8 humans; lion roaring = 16 humans, dragon roaring = 24+ humans

name: Chromatic Orb
description: Ranged attack; damage and special effect determined by gemstone type: Quartz [Lvl 1, 10gp, lvl 1, 1d4 dmg, light(+2 to hit in low light)], Ruby [Lvl 2, 50gp, 1d6 damg, heat (-2 AC, hit, saves 1d4 rd)]...

name: Colour Spray
description: 20′ cone (20′ wide end); stuns, blinds, or knocks out 1d6 targets based on HD

name: Dancing Lights
description: Up to 4 lights move within range at caster’s direction

name: Detect Illusion
description: Reveals illusions within 10′/level from caster via touch

name: Glamour
description: Caster appears as a different (but identical) person; SV to detect

name: Hypnotism
description: 1d6 targets follow simple commands; SV Negates

name: Light
description: 15′ radius light; can blind one target (SV vs Spells) or dispel darkness
reversed: Darkness: 15′ radius magical darkness; blinds target on failed SV vs Spells

name: Phantasmal Force
description: Visual illusion in 20′ cube; ends if disbelieved or caster stops concentrating

name: Read Magic
description: Decipher magical writing on scrolls and spell books

name: Spook
description: Target flees in panic; SV Negates; new save each round

name: Wall of Fog
description: 10′ cube/level of fog blocks infravision and normal vision

name: Blindness/Deafness
description: Target permanently blind or deaf; SV Negates; not a disease (no cure disease)

name: Blur
description: Caster’s outline blurs; +1 saves vs direct magic; attackers at –4/–2

name: Detect Magic
description: Magic objects and areas glow

name: False Aura
description: Detect magic deflected; divination spells return opposite result

name: Fascinate
description: Target becomes besotted with caster; SV Negates; ends if caster attacks

name: Hypnotic Pattern
description: Patterns entrance up to 24HD of creatures in 30′ sq while concentrating; SV Negates

name: Improved Phantasmal Force
description: Visual and sound illusion in 20′ cube; ends if disbelieved or caster stops

name: Invisibility
description: Target invisible until it attacks or casts a spell

name: Magic Mouth
description: Object speaks up to 25 words when triggered condition is met

name: Mirror Image
description: 1d4 duplicates; attacks cancel one image

name: Quasimorph
description: Caster’s size changes by up to ±50%

name: Whispering Wind
description: Send up to 100-word message to known location at 1 mile/level speed

name: Blacklight
description: 30′ diameter invisible (to others) illumination; caster sees normally

name: Dispel Illusion
description: End all non-instant illusion spells in 20′ cube

name: Fear
description: Targets in 60′ cone (30′ wide end) flee for 1 round/level; SV Negates

name: Hallucinatory Terrain
description: Disguise terrain as different type; dispelled by touch

name: Invisibility 10′ Radius
description: All within 10′ of target invisible until they attack or cast

name: Nondetection
description: Caster invisible to all scrying and location magic

name: Paralysation
description: Paralyse creatures in 20′ cube up to level×2 total HD; SV Negates

name: Phantom Steed
description: Illusory mount with movement 30′ (10′) per caster level

name: Rope Trick
description: Rope leads to extradimensional space; holds up to 6 humans

name: Spectral Force
description: Multi-sense illusion in 20′ cube; ends if disbelieved or caster stops

name: Suggestion
description: Target follows a reasonable suggestion; SV Negates

name: Wraithform
description: Become insubstantial; pass through small holes; immune to non-magical attacks

name: Confusion
description: 3d6 creatures in 60′ act randomly for duration; SV Negates

name: Dispel Magic
description: End all non-instant spells in 20′ cube

name: Emotion
description: All in 40′ sq overcome with chosen emotion while concentrating; SV Negates

name: Illusory Stamina
description: Up to 4 persons believe they are unwounded; ignore hp penalties

name: Improved Invisibility
description: Target invisible even while attacking; +4 AC and saves

name: Massmorph
description: Up to 100 human-sized creatures within area appear as trees

name: Minor Creation
description: Create 1 cu ft/level of vegetable matter

name: Phantasmal Killer
description: Terrifying illusion pursues target; SV +2 or die from fright

name: Rainbow Pattern
description: Swirling colours entrance up to 24HD while concentrating; SV Negates

name: Shadow Monsters
description: Shadow creatures with caster’s level in HD; deal 1d2 damage; 20% real

name: Solid Fog
description: 10′ cube/level of fog blocks infravision and vision; movement reduced to 1/10

name: Veil of Abandonment
description: Aura causes creatures to ignore or avoid caster and allies

name: Chaos
description: 60′ diameter area of random actions; SV Negates

name: Demi-Shadow Monsters
description: Shadow creatures with caster’s level in HD; deal 1d4 damage; 40% real

name: Illusion
description: All-senses illusion in 20′ cube for duration

name: Looking Glass
description: View any place or object for duration

name: Major Creation
description: Create 1 cu ft/level of non-living matter (veg: 6t/lvl, mineral: 12t/lvl)

name: Maze of Mirrors
description: Single subject lost in mirrored maze; escape time based on INT

name: Projected Image
description: Illusory duplicate of caster; spells appear to come from it; dispelled by touch

name: Seeming
description: Disguise 1 subject/2 levels as any humanoid; height within ±1′

name: Shadowcast
description: Shadows in area show scenes from the past

name: Shadowy Transformation
description: Transform touched object (1 cu ft/level) into shadow-stuff

name: Time Flow
description: Within area, 1 hour passes for every turn of real time

name: Visitation
description: Send 5-minute mental message to any known person; SV Negates

name: Acid Fog
description: 10′ cube/level; acid damage: 1/2/4/8 per round of exposure

name: Dream Quest
description: Target must complete a dream quest; SV Negates; 1 damage/day if refused

name: Impersonation
description: Exactly duplicate a specific person in appearance, voice, and mannerisms

name: Manifest Dream
description: After 8 hours sleep, caster can manifest a dream as reality; effects vary

name: Mass Suggestion
description: 1 subject/level follows a reasonable suggestion; SV Negates

name: Mislead
description: Create illusory duplicate; caster becomes invisible simultaneously

name: Permanent Illusion
description: Persistent all-senses illusion in 20′ cube; lasts until dispelled

name: Shades
description: Shadow creatures with caster’s level in HD; deal 1d6 damage; 60% real

name: Through the Looking Glass
description: View through a mirror or similar surface; can also open a portal

name: Triggered Illusion
description: All-senses illusion in 20′ cube activates when predetermined condition occurs

name: True Seeing
description: See secret doors, illusions, invisible creatures, and enchanted objects

name: Vision
description: Make a sacrifice to receive a vision from a supernatural power
